ANWAmericansRev.civ_bonus: Manors spawn a Citizen when built; Forts spawn 2 Gatling Guns when built.
ANWAmericansRev.playstyle: Boom manors for Citizens, FF into Gatling Gun + Regular mass; Minutemen defend against early rushes; strong industrial-age timing attack.

ANWArgentines.civ_bonus: Home City Shipments arrive slightly faster; elite infantry never rout.
ANWArgentines.playstyle: Rush forward base, mass Granaderos and Lancers with Musketeer screen; push and re-wall rather than defend home base.

ANWAztecs.civ_bonus: Builds Warchief units and earns XP through Tribute; no Colonial age-up cost.
ANWAztecs.playstyle: Tribute boom to 18+ villagers, harass with Macehualtin + Coyote Runners in Colonial, FF to Jaguar/Eagle Knight mass; hug chokes, avoid open fights.

ANWBajaCalifornians.civ_bonus: Can build up to 7 Saloons; gains 2 bonus cards on Commerce Age.
ANWBajaCalifornians.playstyle: Spread Town Centers and Trading Posts for map control; Saloon Outlaws supplement an Insurgente/Chinaco army; raid-economy over turtling.

ANWBarbary.civ_bonus: Can train Privateers with increased build limit, which can train additional units.
ANWBarbary.playstyle: Dock-first naval economy; Corsair raids deny enemy trade; Barbary Warriors and mercs close land fights; Xebecs dominate water maps.

ANWBrazil.civ_bonus: Receives a free Covered Wagon with every Age; starts with 7 Citizens.
ANWBrazil.playstyle: Spread Mills and Plantations for multi-node economy; steady Covered Wagon trickle keeps forward bases funded; Voluntarios from Town Centers.

ANWBritish.civ_bonus: Manors automatically spawn a Settler when built.
ANWBritish.playstyle: Boom via Manor-spawned Settlers; wall harbor early; Musketeer + Longbow lines; strong navy; land army funded by naval shipments and mercenary contracts.

ANWCalifornians.civ_bonus: Cows gather more from Haciendas; can keep 3x as many cows; 2 bonus cards on Industrial Age.
ANWCalifornians.playstyle: Hacienda cow-boom for food; spread resource patches with Markets; Californio cavalry + Insurgente infantry army; boom into FI timing.

ANWCanadians.civ_bonus: Manor spawns a Metis Pathfinder when built; Villagers gain ranged attack each Age.
ANWCanadians.playstyle: Boom Manors for Metis Pathfinders; turtle home base with stone walls; counter-attack from hardened core; Ranger skirmish line.

ANWCentralAmericans.civ_bonus: Artillery trains early; Forts buildable in Commerce Age; 2 bonus cards on Commerce Age.
ANWCentralAmericans.playstyle: Fast Fortress via early Fort; Commerce Age Fort + artillery punishes passive opponents; mass Insurgente/Chinaco mid-game.

ANWChileans.civ_bonus: Home City Shipments arrive slightly faster; elite infantry never rout.
ANWChileans.playstyle: Wall high ground in rings; steady Republican infantry + Lancer push; slow snowball to defended Industrial timing rather than early rush.

ANWChinese.civ_bonus: Starts with a Flail Elephant; Banner Armies train multiple unit types at once.
ANWChinese.playstyle: Eight-Banner macro — cluster buildings near TC, wall early with stone, macro Banner Armies, counter-attack from hardened core.

ANWColumbians.civ_bonus: Shipments arrive faster; gains Simón Bolívar hero at Fortress Age.
ANWColumbians.playstyle: Forward base pressure from Colonial; Llanero and Lancer shock cavalry sweep flanks; sustained column push with Pikeman anchor.

ANWDutch.civ_bonus: Banks automatically generate coin without villagers.
ANWDutch.playstyle: Boom Banks for passive coin, dock-first fishing fleet; tech into Ruyter + Halberdier army; Fluyt shipments supplement; strong navy.

ANWEgyptians.civ_bonus: Trains Citizens (70 coin); free Mameluke per shipment from Fortress Age; Khevite Fusiliers replace Revolutionaries.
ANWEgyptians.playstyle: Fortify high ground then snowball; Mameluke cavalry per shipment grows a dangerous force; hard to dislodge once entrenched.

ANWEthiopians.civ_bonus: Neftenya units gain attack with each Age; unique Royal units from Ras.
ANWEthiopians.playstyle: Fortify high ground with stone walls; Neftenya marksman line grows stronger with each Age; Shotel Warriors raid; hold citadel then push.

ANWFinnish.civ_bonus: Torps gather nearby resources; advanced Arsenal upgrades; Karelian Jaegers as alternative Settlers.
ANWFinnish.playstyle: Torp-boom for passive food/wood; turtle with stone walls; Jaegers gather and fight; tech into Hakkapelit cavalry + Grenadier wall.

ANWFrench.civ_bonus: Home City Shipments arrive slightly faster; Coureur des Bois gather faster than Settlers.
ANWFrench.playstyle: Coureur des Bois boom; quick mass eco; Wall TC core early; Cuirassier + Skirmisher flexible army; shipment-heavy push.

ANWFrenchCanadians.civ_bonus: Starts with a Native Scout; trains Metis Voyageurs instead of Settlers.
ANWFrenchCanadians.playstyle: Tight civic core; TC and Outpost militia defense; reactive counter-punch rather than open aggression; Cuirassier at Fortress.

ANWGermans.civ_bonus: Starts with 2 free Uhlans per card shipped; Settler Wagons replace standard Settlers.
ANWGermans.playstyle: Mass Uhlans from home city cards; Settler Wagon eco; multi-barracks infantry boom; Doppelsoldner + Uhlan combo overwhelms.

ANWHaitians.civ_bonus: Town Centers and Taverns slowly spawn Pirates for free; Maroons replace Revolutionaries.
ANWHaitians.playstyle: Free Pirate stream from TC + Taverns; choke-hug with Maroon infantry mass; quick harass from forward warbands; minimal walls.

ANWHaudenosaunee.civ_bonus: Builds Longhouses that train infantry and can garrison; unique War Chief unit.
ANWHaudenosaunee.playstyle: Claim Trading Posts for XP trickle; Longhouse multi-unit production; fast Mohawk Warrior rush or FF into Aenna mass.

ANWHausa.civ_bonus: Griot aura boosts nearby units; unique Lifidi Knight heavy cavalry.
ANWHausa.playstyle: Scatter Markets and Granaries across resource nodes; Griot support + Lifidi Knight cavalry; boom then FI trade-route economy.

ANWHungarians.civ_bonus: Outposts spawn Hajduks, Grenadiers, Pandours, and Hussars as you age up; Grenzers replace Revolutionaries.
ANWHungarians.playstyle: Over-build Stables; Hussar cavalry pressure continuously; Outpost militia supplementss army; loose base for fast cavalry egress.
ANWHungarians.age_up: Covered Wagon with each Outpost shipment

ANWInca.civ_bonus: Inca buildings require no wood; Kallanka trains several unit types simultaneously.
ANWInca.playstyle: Wall high ground in concentric rings with Tambos and Kallankas; slow Industrial snowball; Huaraca ranged mass + Chimu speed harass.

ANWIndians.civ_bonus: Elephant units get bonus from nearby Consulate upgrades; Urumi Swordsman unique melee unit.
ANWIndians.playstyle: Fortify high-ground citadel; grow Elephant/Howdah army via Consulate allies; Sepoy musket line holds while Elephants close.

ANWIndonesians.civ_bonus: Can train Wokou Junks; Ruyter and Halberdier get unique skins.
ANWIndonesians.playstyle: Wokou Junk naval pressure; choke-hug with Javanese Spearman + Cetbang Cannon on land; guerrilla infantry strikes avoid open fights.

ANWItalians.civ_bonus: Lombardy Banks auto-generate coin; Papal Guard unique heavy infantry.
ANWItalians.playstyle: Lombard coin boom; mass Papal Guard + Bersagliere infantry columns; General units inspire levy; multi-barracks civic layout.

ANWJapanese.civ_bonus: Shrines auto-generate resources; can train Daimyo and Shogun hero units.
ANWJapanese.playstyle: Plant Shrines everywhere for passive resource trickle; defend with isolated towers and cavalry; tech deep via Wonders; Yumi + Samurai army.

ANWLakota.civ_bonus: Cannot build standard walls or Forts; Teepee auras boost nearby units.
ANWLakota.playstyle: Over-build Stables; all-cavalry Axe Rider + Tokala rush; raid economy and map control; punish any exposed eco with speed.

ANWMaltese.civ_bonus: Towers and Outposts cost no wood; Sacre Infermeria heals nearby units.
ANWMaltese.playstyle: FF into single fortified bastion position; Hospitaller Knights sortie from walls; very hard to dislodge; expand only after citadel is secure.

ANWMayans.civ_bonus: Holcan Javelineer build limit grows each shipment; 2 bonus cards on Imperial Age.
ANWMayans.playstyle: Choke-hug with Holcan Javelineer + Cruzob Infantry mass; harass from forward warbands; scaling Holcan swarm from shipments.

ANWMexicans.civ_bonus: Can build Haciendas and a Cathedral with unique upgrades.
ANWMexicans.playstyle: Multi-barracks Insurgente + Chinaco levy spam; General heroes inspire lines; Hacienda eco sustains continuous production.

ANWMexicansRev.civ_bonus: Can train Mexican Outlaws from Saloon in addition to local Outlaws.
ANWMexicansRev.playstyle: Outlaw supplement via Saloon; Chinaco cavalry + Insurgente infantry levy; civic core layout; shipments arrive slightly faster.

ANWNapoleonicFrance.civ_bonus: Starts with Cuirassier hero; Grande Armée cards ship large infantry formations.
ANWNapoleonicFrance.playstyle: Push forward barracks and stables; Cuirassier + Voltigeur column advances; sustained forward pressure with rally-to-front-base shipments.

ANWOttomans.civ_bonus: Town Center automatically trains Settlers for free over time.
ANWOttomans.playstyle: Free Settler trickle removes eco bottleneck; over-build Artillery Foundries; slow siege-column with Janissary escort; stone-and-forward walls.

ANWPeruvians.civ_bonus: Shipments arrive slightly faster; gains bonus from Simón Bolívar ally at Fortress.
ANWPeruvians.playstyle: Wall high ground in rings with Kallankas; Lancer + Rodelero push; slow Industrial snowball; never overextend from fortified line.

ANWPortuguese.civ_bonus: Gets 1 free Covered Wagon with each Age-up.
ANWPortuguese.playstyle: Dock-first fishing fleet; Covered Wagons fund forward expansion; Cassador + Organ Gun mid-game; strong naval support throughout.

ANWRevFrance.civ_bonus: Trains Sans Culottes instead of Settlers (stronger fighters, slower gatherers); gains Eclaireur scout at Commerce Age.
ANWRevFrance.playstyle: Multi-barracks Sans Culottes levy spam; Eclaireur scout flanks; Cuirassier cavalry arrives at Fortress; civic core with Outpost militia.

ANWRioGrande.civ_bonus: Can research Guard upgrades in Fortress Age; may train heavy artillery an age early; 2 bonus cards on Fortress Age.
ANWRioGrande.playstyle: Fast Fortress for early Guard + artillery; spread TCs and Trading Posts for map control; raid with Chinaco cavalry; skip turtle.

ANWRomanians.civ_bonus: Outpost Wagon shipped each Age; Outposts spawn Rosior Dragoons when built.
ANWRomanians.playstyle: Tight civic core with Outpost militia; Rosior Dragoon cavalry from every Outpost; reactive defense that counter-punches hard.

ANWRussians.civ_bonus: Trains cheap Strelet infantry in batches; Cossacks available from Stables.
ANWRussians.playstyle: Wide Cossack raid bands keep enemy occupied; cheap Strelet batches fill lines; rush to third Town Center; Blockhouses replace stone walls.

ANWSouthAfricans.civ_bonus: Villagers and Banks gather faster; receives a free Trek Wagon each Age.
ANWSouthAfricans.playstyle: Bank coin boom + Trek Wagon expansion; dock-first on water; Ruyter cavalry control the mid-game; strong naval with Fluyt.

ANWSpanish.civ_bonus: Starts with Missionaries that can convert Treasures; Unction upgrade buffs all units.
ANWSpanish.playstyle: Forward barracks + stables pressure from Colonial; Rodelero + Lancer push with Missionary heal support; sustained forward-base doctrine.

ANWSwedes.civ_bonus: Torp buildings passively gather nearby resources.
ANWSwedes.playstyle: Torp passive eco; push forward barracks and stables early; Carolean + Hakkapelit combined arms; relentless forward pressure.

ANWTexians.civ_bonus: Minutemen levies can be called repeatedly from Town Centers and Outposts; 2 bonus cards on Industrial Age.
ANWTexians.playstyle: Push barracks and Outposts forward; Minuteman swarms defend while Regulars train; Republic militia mass into Sharpshooter FF timing.

ANWUSA.civ_bonus: Starts with a free Covered Wagon; Federal Politicians ship powerful unique wagons.
ANWUSA.playstyle: Multi-barracks line infantry boom with Outpost militia; Federal State cards provide powerful wagons; Minutemen defend early; Regular + Sharpshooter mid-game.

ANWYucatan.civ_bonus: Holcan Javelineer build limit grows with each shipment; 2 bonus cards on Fortress Age.
ANWYucatan.playstyle: Choke warfare with Yucateco Insurgentes and Cruzob mass; Mayan techs in Native Embassy scale the Holcan swarm; guerrilla strikes from jungle.
